mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.name AS role_name FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id ORDER BY u.id

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.name AS role_name FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
ORDER BY u.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_role (user_id, role_id) VALUES (#{id}, (SELECT id FROM role WHERE name = #{role}))
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.name AS role_name FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id}

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.name AS role_name FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.code FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
